comment: Crowd identity trait pools for Hesperus Market. Loaded by crowd_director.gd. The contract generator (post-sprint) samples from files like this — add districts by adding files, not code.
comment_funnel: PHASE: single scripted bounty (Option B). target_in_crowd=false -> the crowd is PURE DECOYS, no is_target NPC. funnel_profile is the courtyard Korvaxi's known traits (read from his sprite); it drives clue values + witness hints so the funnel narrows toward HIM, but the only valid scan/confront is the scripted courtyard model itself. Candidates share his build and differ in >=1 trait. When the generator takes over: set target_in_crowd=true (or delete these keys) and it rolls a hidden-in-crowd target again.
